MAN B&W ·Engine

MAN B&W L70MC Marine Diesel

Comprehensive spare parts reference for the MAN B&W L70MC two-stroke marine diesel engine.

Parts catalog
How to use this list: Part numbers match OEM service manuals. Use the request button below to ask about availability and pricing. Include the part number, quantity, and delivery port.

Plates not extractable from this PDF: the following plates exist in the catalogue but their item numbers are embedded in raster drawings rather than searchable text. Order by plate number + item number from the drawing in the original manual.
  • Plate 90501 – Crankshaft
  • Plate 90621 – Arrangement of Layshaft
  • Plate 90806 – Valve Gear - Details
  • Plate 90913 – High-Pressure Pipes

  • Plate 90915 – Overflow Valve

  • Plate 91103 – Safety Valve

  • Plate 91207 – Arrangement of Piston Cooling

Contact us
ASIL TRADING

We source and deliver maritime and industrial spare parts globally. Engine components, pumps, navigation equipment, sensors, electrical, and auxiliary equipment. Emergency timelines and obsolete items handled.
